title: MTG Card Scanner
description: Scan Magic: The Gathering cards in seconds with Spellvault. The fastest MTG card scanner app for iPhone — identify, catalog, and manage your collection without manual entry.

hero.title: MTG Card Scanner
hero.description: Scan your Magic cards fast and build a clean, searchable inventory — no manual entry needed.

sections.title: The fastest MTG card scanner app

sections.title: Stop entering cards by hand

sections.title: Frequently Asked Questions
sections.description: Common questions about using Spellvault as your MTG card scanner app.

items.title: What is an MTG card scanner app?
items.description: An MTG card scanner app uses your phone camera to identify Magic: The Gathering cards automatically and log them to your collection — faster and more accurately than typing each card by hand.

items.title: How does Spellvault identify scanned MTG cards?
items.description: Spellvault reads the card through your camera and matches it against the full Magic card database, detecting the card name, set, and edition in seconds.

items.title: Can I scan a large box of MTG cards in one session?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is built for bulk scanning. You can move through boxes, binders, and collection lots without stopping between cards.

items.title: Does Spellvault work as an MTG card price checker too?
items.description: Yes. After scanning, each card shows current market prices so you can track collection value without leaving the app.

items.title: Will Spellvault detect duplicate MTG cards?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault flags cards you already have in your collection so you can easily identify extras to trade or sell.

items.title: Can I organize scanned cards into decks or binders?
items.description: Yes. Once cards are scanned and logged, you can move them into any deck, binder, or folder structure inside Spellvault.

items.title: Is Spellvault available for iPhone?
items.description: Yes. Spellvault is a native iPhone app designed for a fast, smooth scanning experience on iOS.
